market_regime.overall_trend: TRENDING — equities in a strong uptrend with S&P 500 above 7,400 and Technology sector up 8.43% WoW. Broad market momentum is bullish but concentrated in tech.

market_regime.position_sizing_guidance: Full standard sizing permitted. VIX 18 = no discount applied. Max single-name equity position: 5-8% of equity book. Sector ETF positions up to 10%.

crypto_risk_warnings.detail: Trump meeting national security team Monday to discuss resuming military strikes on Iran after negotiations deadlocked. Escalation would trigger broad risk-off, likely causing BTC to drop 5-15% rapidly. All crypto positions should have hard stops in place before Monday's NSC meeting outcome.

BTC RSI at 67.65, approaching overbought territory (70+). SOL RSI already at 74.91, LINK at 72.34. Multiple assets simultaneously near overbought — risk of synchronized pullback if BTC fails to hold $80K on any test.

crypto_risk_warnings.event: Record SPR Release / Oil Price Shock
crypto_risk_warnings.detail: Largest-ever weekly SPR release (1.22M bpd) signals administration concern about oil prices. Energy sector collapse (-5.35%) could spread to broader risk sentiment if it signals economic slowdown fears.

BTC dominance at 58.36% is elevated. If dominance peaks and rotates to alts, BTC could consolidate while alts spike. The bot should not be caught fully long BTC with no alt exposure if rotation begins.
Policy uncertainty at FDA could create volatility in biotech/healthcare names but unlikely to directly impact crypto markets.

macro_events_this_week.detail: If Trump approves military action against Iran, expect: oil spike (+10-20%), equity selloff (S&P -2 to -5%), gold surge, BTC drop. Position all books with this tail risk in mind. Consider holding GLD as explicit hedge.

The largest-ever SPR weekly release signals administration is actively suppressing oil prices. Energy sector already down 5.35%. USO and XLE longs are dangerous. Watch for secondary inflation/deflation signal.

S&P 500 touching new highs at 7,400 may attract profit-taking. Tech sector up 8.43% in one week is an aggressive move that could see consolidation. Momentum is strong but don't ignore extended valuation risk.

Commodity supercycle signal. Positive for materials, infrastructure, and risk assets broadly. But commodity spikes historically precede central bank tightening responses — monitor Fed speak this week.

specific_risk_flags: Iran escalation is the #1 tail risk — hard stops mandatory on all positions before Monday NSC meeting

max_position_size_guidance.overall_note: VIX at 18 = standard sizing. Iran risk warrants keeping 10-15% of total book in cash/GLD as tail hedge. Do not deploy full capital in trending momentum names without stop-loss discipline.

confidence_reason: Equity conditions are bullish (VIX 18, S&P at highs, tech momentum strong) but crypto setups are weak (no A/B grade signals, all SKIP or C_GRADE, BTC-led regime limiting alt opportunities), and Iran military action risk on Monday creates a meaningful binary tail event that warrants holding cash reserves and keeping position sizes disciplined rather than pressing full allocation.
